raw: {"perspective": "Legal Advisor", "findings": [{"severity": "BLOCK", "file_or_area": "GDPR Article 22 consent flow", "issue": "Insufficient or non-existent consent flow for automated decision-making", "recommended_fix": "Implement explicit consent flow for automated decision-making, ensuring users understand and agree to the process"}, {"severity": "WARN", "file_or_area": "AZ Personal Data Protection Act", "issue": "Potential non-compliance for Baku launch", "recommended_fix": "Review and ensure compliance with AZ Personal Data Protection Act requirements for the Baku launch"}, {"severity": "BLOCK", "file_or_area": "Platform liability", "issue": "Insufficient consideration of legal exposure if AURA score is used for hiring decisions", "recommended_fix": "Conduct thorough risk assessment and implement necessary safeguards to mitigate potential legal exposure"}, {"severity": "WARN", "file_or_area": "Data processor agreements", "issue": "Uncertainty about the existence and adequacy of DPAs with Supabase, Google Cloud, and Railway", "recommended_fix": "Verify the existence and adequacy of DPAs with all data processors and ensure compliance with relevant regulations"}, {"severity": "WARN", "file_or_area": "Terms of Service", "issue": "Uncertainty about whether current ToS covers AI-generated assessments", "recommended_fix": "Review and update the ToS to explicitly address AI-generated assessments and ensure compliance with relevant regulations"}], "overall_verdict": "WARN", "whistleblower_flag": null, "next_files_to_read": ["supabase/migrations/", "apps/api/app/routers/assessment.py"]}

findings.issue: Insufficient or non-existent consent flow for automated decision-making
findings.recommended_fix: Implement explicit consent flow for automated decision-making, ensuring users understand and agree to the process
Review and ensure compliance with AZ Personal Data Protection Act requirements for the Baku launch

findings.issue: Insufficient consideration of legal exposure if AURA score is used for hiring decisions
findings.recommended_fix: Conduct thorough risk assessment and implement necessary safeguards to mitigate potential legal exposure

findings.issue: Uncertainty about the existence and adequacy of DPAs with Supabase, Google Cloud, and Railway
findings.recommended_fix: Verify the existence and adequacy of DPAs with all data processors and ensure compliance with relevant regulations

findings.issue: Uncertainty about whether current ToS covers AI-generated assessments
findings.recommended_fix: Review and update the ToS to explicitly address AI-generated assessments and ensure compliance with relevant regulations
